items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Derrick Coleman. Syracuse PF was the 1st pick by NJ in 90. Was really good first 4 yrs (20 ppg, 10.6 rpg) won 90-91 ROY & all-star in 93-94. Was poster child for Gen X complaints by old timers. Traded to PHI in 95, was role guy there & in CHA. Retired in 05.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Derrick Coleman. Syracuse PF was the 1st pick by NJ in 90. Was really good first 4 yrs (20 ppg, 10.6 rpg) won 90-91 ROY & all-star in 93-94. Was poster child for Gen X complaints by old timers. Traded to PHI in 95, was role guy there & in CHA. Retired in 05.

items.title: Sources: The Orlando Magic will add DJ Bakker as an assistant coach. He was a Hornets assistant coach and head coach of the Greensboro Swarm in the G League. He’s been an assistant for the Bucks and Pistons. Bakker and Orlando Magic coach Sean Sweeney worked together in Detroit.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Orlando Magic will add DJ Bakker as an assistant coach. He was a Hornets assistant coach and head coach of the Greensboro Swarm in the G League. He’s been an assistant for the Bucks and Pistons. Bakker and Orlando Magic coach Sean Sweeney worked together in Detroit.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Matt Bullard. Iowa big was undrafted but signed w/HOU in 90. Developed role as a stretch big around Hakeem. Played mostlyr w/HOU & also spent time in Greece, ATL & CHA. Peaked at 7.6 ppg but wasn't a boarder/blocker. Retired in 02 & does TV work.

items.title: Federal prosecutors filed new charges against NBA veteran Terry Rozier today. Prosecutors say Rozier took a roughly $100,000 "bribe" to exit early from a March 2023 Hornets game so a group of sports gamblers could win bets on his props.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Federal prosecutors filed new charges against NBA veteran Terry Rozier today. Prosecutors say Rozier took a roughly $100,000 "bribe" to exit early from a March 2023 Hornets game so a group of sports gamblers could win bets on his props.

The game in question...

(via Mike Vorkunov)
#NBA

items.title: A defendant in the federal NBA gambling case told a judge today he paid an NBA player to change his performance so he could bet on him. The player, a federal prosecutor said, was former Charlotte Hornets and Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
A defendant in the federal NBA gambling case told a judge today he paid an NBA player to change his performance so he could bet on him. The player, a federal prosecutor said, was former Charlotte Hornets and Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier. 

Free to read👇 www.nytimes.com/athletic/731...

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.

items.title: Hollander POTD Kendall Gill. Illinois SG was drafted 5th in 90 by CHA. Great defender & slasher, jumper was less reliable. Had 20 ppg in 91-92 but usage fell w/LJ & Zo in town. Peaked at 22 ppg in 96-97 w/NJ, where he had an 11 steal game. Not quite All-Star but a good player.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Kenny Gattison. Old Dominion PF was drafted 55th in 86 by PHO. After solid rookie year, missed almost 2 yrs w/injuries. Signed w/expansion CHA in 89, where he played 6 yrs peaking at 13 ppg, 7 rpg. Per bio "will run through a wall & ask why later."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
